name: Kentucky Burgoo
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound boneless beef chuck roast, cut into cubes (3/4-inch)
2 cups peeled and cubed potatoes (about 3 medium)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4 1/2-quart Dutch oven, combine the water, tomatoes (undrained), beef chuck roast cubes, and chicken bouillon granules. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
2. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Add chicken pieces. Return to boiling; reduce heat.
4. Simmer, covered, about 45 more minutes or until beef and chicken are tender. Remove chicken pieces and set aside.
5. Stir potatoes, succotash, okra, carrots, onion, curry powder, and sugar into the mixture in the Dutch oven. Cover and return to boiling; reduce heat.
6. Simmer for another 20 minutes or until vegetables are tender. Meanwhile, when chicken is cool enough to handle, remove meat from bones and discard skin (if any) and bones. Cut the chicken into bite-size pieces.
7. Add chicken pieces to the Dutch oven. Cook about 5 more minutes or until heated through.
